nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 67 overnight. Southeast wind 33 to 37 mph, with gusts as high as 54 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Patchy Blowing Dust
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am, then patchy blowing dust and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 79. Southwest wind 18 to 31 mph, with gusts as high as 45 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Patchy Blowing Dust then Mostly Clear
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy blowing dust before 7pm. Mostly clear. Low around 50, with temperatures rising to around 52 overnight. West wind 14 to 26 mph, with gusts as high as 38 mph.
